<?php /** * sect131r2 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect131r2 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(131, 8, 3, 2, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '03E5A88919D7CAFCBF415F07C2176573B2', '04B8266A46C55657AC734CE38F018F2192' ); $this->setBasePoint( '0356DCD8F2F95031AD652D23951BB366A8', '0648F06D867940A5366D9E265DE9EB240F' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('0400000000000000016954A233049BA98F', 16)); } }
